evidence.storeys_found: Tooling issue: storey/space extraction executed but returned no result object (tool output was null).
evidence.note: A subsequent tool run showed storeys and spaces exist, but the exact count of distinct storeys with non-equal elevations and complete space assignment could not be evidenced in a single successful returned dataset.

checks.notes: Could not produce tool-returned evidence that there are exactly 2 storeys with non-equal elevations and that all IfcSpace are assigned to one of these storeys.

evidence.space_counts_by_storey: Tooling issue: storey->space containment counts not returned in a single successful dataset.
evidence.spaces_total: Tooling issue: count exists in later run but per-storey split could not be evidenced.

checks.notes: Could not evidence exactly 8 rooms total and exactly 4 per storey based on IfcSpace containment in each IfcBuildingStorey.

evidence.space_solid_and_area: Tooling issue: geometry checks attempted; some geometry APIs not available in this environment in one run, and later runs did not return a consolidated per-space pass/fail with computed net floor area.
evidence.note: A bbox-area proxy was computed in code, but net floor area per IFC definition was not computed and no per-space solid closure validation was returned.

checks.notes: No tool-evidenced confirmation that every IfcSpace has a valid closed solid and computable net floor area > 0.

evidence.self_intersection_checks: No tool-returned plan loop / boundary loop self-intersection analysis for each space was produced.

checks.notes: No evidence that room boundary loops are closed and non-self-intersecting in plan, nor that room solids do not self-intersect.

evidence.vertical_stacking: Tooling issue: stacking check code executed but tool returned null output, so no z-extent vs storey elevation evidence is available.

checks.notes: Could not evidence that Level 2 spaces are vertically above Level 1 and that no space spans both storeys.

evidence.gable_geometry_analysis: Tooling issue: roof face-normal clustering analysis executed but tool returned null output, so no evidence of exactly two opposing sloped planes meeting at one straight ridge line.

checks.notes: Could not evidence that the roof is a gable roof with two main planar faces and a single straight ridge line; also could not confirm faces are not horizontal.

evidence.ridge_centering: Tooling issue: footprint centroid vs roof center computation executed but tool returned null output.

checks.notes: Could not evidence ridge midpoint centered over footprint within 10% tolerance.

evidence.wall_perimeter_gap_check: Tooling issue: wall axis endpoint nearest-gap computation executed but tool returned null output.

checks.notes: Could not evidence that external walls form a closed perimeter around Level 1 spaces with no gaps > 20mm.

evidence.volume_check: Tooling issue: attempted to compute volumes for walls/slabs/roof; tool-returned dataset with non-zero volumes was not available.

checks.notes: Could not evidence that all wall, slab, and roof elements have non-zero positive computed volume.

evidence.placement_finiteness: Tooling issue: placement matrix finiteness check executed but tool returned null output.

checks.notes: Could not evidence all placements resolve without circular references and yield finite coordinates.

issues.fix_hint: Ensure there are exactly 2 IfcBuildingStorey with different Elevation values, and every IfcSpace is contained in exactly one of these storeys via IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned proof of exactly-2-storey structure and complete space assignment.

issues.fix_hint: Create exactly 8 IfcSpace and assign 4 to each storey using IfcRelContainedInSpatialStructure (storey.ContainsElements).
Give every IfcSpace a closed IfcSweptSolid/IfcFacetedBrep body representation and attach a quantity (e.g., Qto_SpaceBaseQuantities.NetFloorArea) or ensure geometry supports robust area calculation.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned confirmation of closed solids and net floor area > 0 for every space.

issues.fix_hint: Ensure each IfcSpace profile/footprint is a simple closed polygon (no self-intersections) and the resulting 3D solid is valid (no self-intersections).
Place Level 2 spaces with z-min above (or equal to) Level 2 storey elevation and ensure Level 1 spaces do not extend above Level 2 elevation; prevent any space from spanning both storeys.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned z-extent vs elevation checks.

issues.fix_hint: Model the roof as two planar sloped faces meeting at a single straight ridge line (gable). Avoid hip facets and avoid horizontal roof faces.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned geometric proof of gable topology (2 planes + ridge).

issues.fix_hint: Center the gable ridge in plan over the footprint; align ridge midpoint to footprint centroid within 10% of max footprint dimension.
Ensure exterior wall axis endpoints meet (within 0.02m) in a closed loop around Level 1 spaces; fix gaps by adjusting wall endpoints/placements.

evidence.problem: No tool-returned endpoint gap metric for exterior perimeter continuity.

issues.fix_hint: Ensure all walls/slabs/roof have positive thickness and valid solids so computed volume > 0 (no zero-thickness extrusions).

evidence.problem: No tool-returned positive volume verification across elements.

issues.fix_hint: Remove/repair any circular placement references; ensure all IfcLocalPlacement chains resolve to finite transforms (no NaN/Inf).
